languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

languages.text: "Свидетельствую неоспоримый факт распространения ксеноереси на платформе Тиркуаз-4. Священные конструкции платформы скомпрометированы и должны быть подвергнуты ритуалам плазменного очищения".
languages.translation_comment: The characters have discovered several clues indicating that xenoheresy is occurring in this place

languages.text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

traits.locale_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xeno-heresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."
"Attesting to the undeniable spread of xeno-heresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."
"Attesting to the undeniable spread of xeno-heresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

languages.text: 「異教の蔓延が不可避であることを証明する。ティルクアズ4号プラットフォームの聖なる建造物は汚染され、プラズマ浄化の儀式を受ける必要がある」
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

traits.locale_text: 「異教の蔓延が不可避であることを証明する。ティルクアズ4号プラットフォームの聖なる建造物は汚染され、プラズマ浄化の儀式を受ける必要がある。」

languages.text: « Confirmation de la propagation indéniable de la xénohérésie sur Tirkuaz-4. Les structures sacrées de la plateforme ont été compromises et doivent être soumises aux rituels de purification par le plasma. »
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

traits.locale_text: « Confirmation de la propagation indéniable de la xénohérésie sur Tirkuaz-4. Les structures sacrées de la plateforme ont été compromises et doivent être soumises aux rituels de purification par le plasma. »

languages.text: "Bestätige die unbestreitbare Ausbreitung von Xeno-Ketzerei auf Plattform Tirkuaz-4. Die heiligen Strukturen der Plattform wurden kompromittiert und müssen den Ritualen der Plasmareinigung unterzogen werden."
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

traits.locale_text: "Bestätige die unbestreitbare Ausbreitung von Xeno-Ketzerei auf Plattform Tirkuaz-4. Die heiligen Strukturen der Plattform wurden kompromittiert und müssen den Ritualen der Plasmareinigung unterzogen werden."

languages.text: "Platform Tirkuaz-4'te zeno kâfirliğinin inkâr edilemez yayılışını tasdik ediyorum. Platformun kutsal yapıları tehlikeye atılmıştır ve plazma arındırma ayinlerine tabi tutulmalıdır."
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

traits.locale_text: "Platform Tirkuaz-4'te zeno kâfirliğinin inkâr edilemez yayılışını tasdik ediyorum. Platformun kutsal yapıları tehlikeye atılmıştır ve plazma arındırma ayinlerine tabi tutulmalıdır."

languages.text: «Atestiguo la innegable propagación de xenoherejía en la plataforma Tirkuaz-4. Las sagradas estructuras de la estación se han visto afectadas y deben someterse a rituales de purificación por plasma».
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."

traits.locale_text: «Atestiguo la innegable propagación de xenoherejía en la plataforma Tirkuaz-4. Las sagradas estructuras de la estación se han visto afectadas y deben someterse a rituales de purificación por plasma».

languages.text: “提库阿兹4号平台上异形异端的蔓延已确认无疑。平台的神圣结构已遭污染，必须执行等离子净化仪式。”
languages.original_text: "Attesting to the undeniable spread of xenoheresy on Platform Tirkuaz-4. The sacred structures of the platform have been compromised and must be subjected to the rituals of plasma purification."
